message:
test: add proptest coverage for PaneStepExecutorConfig and mission_dispatch types

- proptest_tx_execution.rs: 2 new tests for PaneStepExecutorConfig serde roundtrip + defaults
- proptest_mission_dispatch.rs: 7 tests for DispatchResult, BatchDispatchResult,
  MissionDispatcherConfig serde roundtrips, count consistency, contract fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
